site.footer_tagline: Manufacturing Excellence. Engineered for the Industries That Demand It.

home.about_title: Built on a Foundation of Manufacturing Excellence
home.cta_subtitle: For major project inquiries, contact our team directly. We respond within one business day.
home.what_we_do_text: From complex 5-axis CNC milling to metal 3D printing — Trident Industries is a single-source manufacturer for the industries that demand zero compromise. Every part we deliver is a direct reflection of our commitment to manufacturing excellence.
home.about_text1: Trident Industries, Incorporated was established with one mission: to manufacture components that perform in the environments where failure is not an option. We serve the aerospace, defense, naval, and automotive sectors with the precision, traceability, and engineering expertise these industries demand.
home.divider_title: Built for the Missions That Matter Most
home.about_text2: Every part that leaves our facility has been engineered, programmed, machined, and inspected under the same roof — giving our clients a single, accountable partner from design to delivery.
home.printing_text: Internal channels, organic geometry, topology-optimized structures — our metal 3D printing capability opens design territory that conventional machining simply cannot reach. We bridge both worlds in one facility.
home.hero_subtitle: Advanced manufacturing for aerospace, defense, automotive, and naval applications. Precision machined to tolerances that matter.

services.label: CNC Milling
services.title: 3, 4 & 5-Axis CNC Milling
services.description: Multi-axis machining for the most demanding components in aerospace, defense, and automotive. Our facility runs Haas vertical machining centers capable of complex simultaneous 5-axis operations, enabling tight-tolerance work on titanium, aluminum, Inconel, and stainless steel.

services.label: Additive Manufacturing
services.title: Metal & Polymer 3D Printing
services.description: Additive manufacturing extends what's possible — internal cooling channels, lattice-optimized structures, and organic geometries that no CNC can reach. We produce metal parts in stainless, titanium, and Inconel alongside high-performance polymer components.

specs.label: Polymers
specs.value: Nylon, PEEK, Ultem, ABS, Carbon Fiber

services.label: 3D Scanning
services.title: High-Accuracy 3D Scanning
services.description: Structured light and laser scanning systems capture full-field surface geometry at micron-level accuracy. Used for incoming inspection, first-article validation, and as the starting point for reverse engineering workflows.

services.label: Reverse Engineering
services.title: Reverse Engineering
services.description: We reconstruct legacy, obsolete, or competitor components into fully parametric CAD models — ready to machine, modify, or improve. Starting from scan data, physical measurements, or worn originals, we deliver production-ready documentation.

specs.label: Delivery
specs.value: Step, IGES, native CAD, PDF drawings

services.label: Design & Programming
services.title: CAD / CAM Design & Engineering
services.description: Our engineering team handles the complete design-to-manufacture pipeline. From DFM analysis and tolerance stack-up review to fixture design and CNC program generation — every decision is made with machinability and performance in mind.

gallery.page_description: A selection of components manufactured at Trident Industries — from production CNC runs to complex additive parts.

contact.section_text: Whether you have a set of drawings ready or just a concept — reach out. Our team will review your requirements and provide a rapid response on feasibility, lead time, and pricing.
contact.page_description: For major project inquiries, send us your specifications. Our engineering team responds within 24-48 hours.
